parameters.name: CustomerID
parameters.label: Customer
parameters.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "BUI"
| where DeviceProduct =~ "HoneyForge"
| extend CustomerID = tostring(DeviceCustomString2)
| where isnotempty(CustomerID)
| distinct CustomerID
| sort by CustomerID asc

content.json:
# HoneyForge Threat Detection
---
This workbook provides operational visibility into HoneyForge deception sensor activity. Any event shown here represents a connection attempt against a passive decoy device — treat all interactions as suspicious until validated.

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where DeviceVendor =~ "BUI"
| where DeviceProduct =~ "HoneyForge"
| extend CustomerID = tostring(DeviceCustomString2)
| where "{CustomerID}" == "All" or CustomerID =~ "{CustomerID}"
| summarize
    TotalEvents     = count(),
    UniqueSources   = dcount(SourceIP),
    SensorsHit      = dcount(iff(isempty(tostring(DeviceCustomString3)), tostring(Computer), tostring(DeviceCustomString3))),
    CustomersAffected = dcount(CustomerID)
| extend
    TotalEventsLabel    = tostring(TotalEvents),
    UniqueSourcesLabel  = tostring(UniqueSources),
    SensorsHitLabel     = tostring(SensorsHit),
    CustomersLabel      = tostring(CustomersAffected)
content.title: Overview

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where DeviceVendor =~ "BUI"
| where DeviceProduct =~ "HoneyForge"
| extend CustomerID = tostring(DeviceCustomString2)
| where "{CustomerID}" == "All" or CustomerID =~ "{CustomerID}"
| summarize Events = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| sort by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Event Timeline

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where DeviceVendor =~ "BUI"
| where DeviceProduct =~ "HoneyForge"
| extend
    CustomerID = tostring(DeviceCustomString2),
    SrcIpAddr  = tostring(SourceIP),
    SensorName = iff(isempty(tostring(DeviceCustomString3)), tostring(Computer), tostring(DeviceCustomString3))
| where "{CustomerID}" == "All" or CustomerID =~ "{CustomerID}"
| where isnotempty(SrcIpAddr)
| summarize
    TotalEvents  = count(),
    SensorsHit   = dcount(SensorName),
    SensorList   = strcat_array(make_set(SensorName, 10), ", "),
    LastSeen     = max(TimeGenerated)
    by SrcIpAddr
| sort by TotalEvents desc
| take 25
content.title: Top 25 Attacking Source IPs

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where DeviceVendor =~ "BUI"
| where DeviceProduct =~ "HoneyForge"
| extend
    CustomerID = tostring(DeviceCustomString2),
    SensorName = iff(isempty(tostring(DeviceCustomString3)), tostring(Computer), tostring(DeviceCustomString3)),
    SensorID   = tostring(DeviceCustomString1)
| where "{CustomerID}" == "All" or CustomerID =~ "{CustomerID}"
| summarize
    TotalEvents   = count(),
    UniqueSources = dcount(SourceIP),
    LastEvent     = max(TimeGenerated)
    by SensorName, SensorID, CustomerID
| extend
    MinutesSinceLast = datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastEvent),
    Status = iff(datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastEvent) <= 10, "🟢 Online", "🔴 Offline")
| sort by Status asc, TotalEvents desc
| project
    Status,
    SensorName,
    SensorID,
    CustomerID,
    TotalEvents,
    UniqueSources,
    LastEvent,
    MinutesSinceLast
content.title: Sensor Fleet Health

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where DeviceVendor =~ "BUI"
| where DeviceProduct =~ "HoneyForge"
| extend
    CustomerID = tostring(DeviceCustomString2),
    Severity = case(
        toint(LogSeverity) >= 9, "Critical",
        toint(LogSeverity) >= 7, "High",
        toint(LogSeverity) >= 4, "Medium",
        "Low"
    )
| where "{CustomerID}" == "All" or CustomerID =~ "{CustomerID}"
| summarize Events = count() by Severity
| sort by Events desc
content.title: Events by Severity

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where DeviceVendor =~ "BUI"
| where DeviceProduct =~ "HoneyForge"
| extend
    CustomerID   = tostring(DeviceCustomString2),
    EventProtocol = tostring(Protocol)
| where "{CustomerID}" == "All" or CustomerID =~ "{CustomerID}"
| where isnotempty(EventProtocol)
| summarize Events = count() by EventProtocol
| sort by Events desc
content.title: Events by Protocol

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where DeviceVendor =~ "BUI"
| where DeviceProduct =~ "HoneyForge"
| extend
    CustomerID   = tostring(DeviceCustomString2),
    SrcIpAddr    = tostring(SourceIP),
    SensorName   = iff(isempty(tostring(DeviceCustomString3)), tostring(Computer), tostring(DeviceCustomString3)),
    HourUTC      = hourofday(TimeGenerated),
    DayOfWeek    = dayofweek(TimeGenerated)
| where "{CustomerID}" == "All" or CustomerID =~ "{CustomerID}"
| extend IsOffHours = (DayOfWeek == 0d or DayOfWeek == 6d or HourUTC < 7 or HourUTC >= 19)
| where IsOffHours == true
| where isnotempty(SrcIpAddr)
| summarize
    Events       = count(),
    SensorsHit   = dcount(SensorName),
    FirstSeen    = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen     = max(TimeGenerated)
    by SrcIpAddr, CustomerID
| sort by Events desc
| take 20
content.title: Off-Hours Activity (Top 20 Sources)
